import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_to_end()
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut total = 0
  for p in parts
    match string.parse_int(p)
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        total = total + n * 2
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  println("result=#{total}")
end
